_comment: Editable vehicle profiles imported by the sample at runtime (see route/VehicleProfileRepository). Units: distances in METRES, weights in METRIC TONNES, speed in KM/H. transportationMode is one of the mSDK TranspMode names: PASSENGER_CAR, DELIVERY_TRUCK, PEDESTRIAN, BICYCLE, TAXI, PUBLIC_BUS, MOTORCYCLE. Truck dimensions/weights are only honoured when transportationMode is a truck mode AND the license allows it. nbTrailers: 0 = no trailers; avoid -1 (the SDK 'unset' sentinel).
